collectionName: Sprint 4 Task 4 — Brand Assets Batch 2 Completion Pass

collector.tool: Public page extraction through available browser/web tooling after Apify became unavailable in the active connector list
collector.purpose: Complete source coverage for remaining Batch 2 approved-scope rugby-union organisations and preserve unresolved logo status for Sanity candidate review.
collector.notes: This is a candidate-only completion pass. Apify was visible earlier in the session and used for the previous targeted extraction file, but it was not exposed by connector discovery during this follow-up. No Sanity import, approval, asset upload, public template use or hotlinking occurred. Sponsor, broadcaster and commercial partner marks were ignored.
